vocab.partiremo: we will leave; we will depart

beginnerVocab.partiremo: we will leave; we will depart

advancedVocab.le 23 di sera: 11 PM (note: 'di sera' specifies evening, not morning)
advancedVocab.chiudere le valigie: to pack the suitcases; to finish packing (note: literally 'to close the suitcases')
advancedVocab.sto andando da [nome]: I'm going to [person's] place (note: 'da' + name means to someone's home/place)
advancedVocab.partiremo: we will leave; we will depart (note: future tense, may be confused with present)
advancedVocab.il Cia: the Cia (note: likely a specific place/event, possibly an acronym or local reference)

vocab.ci rivediamo: see each other again; see you again
vocab.tra un po': in a bit; in a little while
vocab.a casa di: to the house of; to (someone's) house

vocab.conoscendoci: knowing ourselves; since we know ourselves (reflexive, about the group)
vocab.non ci saremmo mai svegliati: we would never have woken up
vocab.ce l'hanno spostato: they moved it for us; it was rescheduled

advancedVocab.conoscendoci: knowing ourselves; knowing us (reflexive gerund, implies self-awareness)
advancedVocab.tutti quanti: all of us; every single one (emphatic, more than just 'tutti')
advancedVocab.ce l'hanno spostato: they moved it for us; it was rescheduled (note 'ce' implies 'for us', idiomatic)

vocab.staremo: we will stay; we will be

advancedVocab.in teoria: in theory (implies uncertainty or that something is only planned, not definite)
advancedVocab.andare a farci un pranzo: go have lunch (the 'farci' construction is colloquial and reflexive, meaning 'have for ourselves')
advancedVocab.alle Lollo: the Lollo family; at the Lollo's (colloquial way to refer to a family or group by surname, sometimes with 'alle' for families)

vocab.a casa di: at the house of; to the home of

advancedVocab.perigi: for you all; for you guys (note: likely a regionalism, misspelling, or colloquial form of 'per voi')

advancedVocab.incastrare: to fit together; to slot in (note: often used for fitting pieces together, as in a puzzle or game)
advancedVocab.pezzettini: little pieces; small bits (diminutive form, often used affectionately or to indicate small size)
advancedVocab.Ecco: here you go; there you have it; that's it (discourse marker, often used to draw attention or indicate something is being presented)

beginnerVocab.imballaggio: packing; packaging (note: here, 'packing' as in packing a suitcase)

advancedVocab.imballaggio: packing; packaging (can mean both the act of packing and the material used)

advancedVocab.convinto a: convinced to (note the use of 'a' with 'convinto', which can be confusing)
advancedVocab.Manca 10 alle 6:00: It's 10 to 6:00; 10 minutes to 6:00 (Italian way of telling time, can be confusing for learners)

advancedVocab.stavamo per: we were about to; we were going to (imminent action)
advancedVocab.rimanere a Linate: stay at Linate (Linate is Milan's city airport; culturally specific)
advancedVocab.si è chiuso con noi: it closed with us; it closed while we were there (nuanced: implies the gate closed as they arrived or with them inside)

advancedVocab.ritirata: taken away; withdrawn (note: here likely refers to a document being checked/collected)
advancedVocab.tipo: like; sort of (note: filler word, informal discourse marker)
advancedVocab.grandi quanto un dito: as big as a finger (note: idiomatic size comparison)

vocab.stiamo facendo: we are doing; we are making

advancedVocab.non è ancora atterrato: has not landed yet (note: subject comes after verb, inversion for emphasis or style)

advancedVocab.cioè: that is; I mean (discourse marker, clarifies or rephrases)

vocab.non ce la faccio più: I can't take it anymore; I can't do it anymore
vocab.viaggio della speranza: journey of hope (note: idiomatic, often used for difficult or hopeful journeys)

advancedVocab.fare il sap: do the SAP (note: 'SAP' may refer to a specific activity, exam, or event; context needed)
advancedVocab.viaggio della speranza: journey of hope (note: idiom for a difficult or desperate journey, often used for migrants or challenging situations)

vocab.nostereo: our stereo (note: likely a typo or slang for 'nostro stereo')
vocab.stanno scendo: they are going out; people are coming out (note: likely a typo for 'stanno uscendo')

vocab.in fondo: at the end; at the bottom

vocab.non vedeva l'ora: couldn't wait;was looking forward to (impatience, anticipation)
